sglang.title: Fix gemlite import
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
We do not need to import gemlite cache in the benchmark scripts.
They should already be set from python/sglang/srt/layers/torchao_utils.py

vllm.title: [cd][release] fix race conditions
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
we have two release pipelines, and this can cause race conditions.
let's only generate index for cuda 12 wheels.
to deal with cuda 11.8 wheels, we need to have a separate index url. left as a TODO right now.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix fully sharded LoRAs with Mixtral
vllm.author: n1hility
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes a regression introduced by #9008 , which leads to an assertion error when --fully-sharded-loras is enabled with an adaptor that includes a gate target:
vllm/lora/models.py:352: in __init__
    self._create_lora_modules()
vllm/lora/models.py:506: in _create_lora_modules
    self.register_module
